content.full_text:
November 2, 2004

Lance H. Olson
Olson, Hagel & Fishburn, LLP
555 Capitol Mall, Suite 1425
Sacramento, CA 95814-4602

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-119

Dear Mr. Olson:

This is to inform you that pursuant to our conversation of October 28, 2004, we will be withdrawing your request for advice dated May 27, 2004. As I mentioned over the phone, the Commission believes that the issues you raise should be resolved by new or amended regulations, which we expect to present early in the new year.

I look forward to discussing these matters with you in the next month or so.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Lawrence T. Woodlock
Senior Staff Counsel
